node.statement: MISSING — Grover-Rudolph State Preparation: No general arbitrary-amplitude state preparation. Needed for: (1) preparing the all-1s vector sum_j |j> for the linear combination of block encodings in the preconditioner (Theorem 10, step 1), (2) preparing the coarse-grid eigenvector |hat_u_c> as initial state (Theorem 14). The GR02 method prepares a state with amplitudes proportional to a given probability distribution using O(n) controlled rotations on n qubits — directly expressible via Sturm.jl primitives (when + theta rotations).
